title: Government policy: say no for barred vendor
description: Government procurement dataset where a vendor policy screen produces a hard stop.
track: Track 3 - compliance, risk, and public-sector approval workflows
operator_message: Review the procurement dataset and decide whether the vendor award can proceed.

case_overrides.title: Public-sector procurement vendor screen
case_overrides.business_goal: Stop an award when the vendor screen shows a policy prohibition.
case_overrides.requested_action: Decide whether the vendor award can proceed.

constraints: use only vendor screening record and procurement policy
route hard-stop findings to procurement counsel
consent.reason: procurement owner authorized vendor eligibility review
